subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the most holy Court of the Desired One, Whose power is sanctified above all the powers of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که قدرتش مقدسست از قدرتهای عالم و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
